description: gamesmanagement.googleapis.com hosts the Google Play Games Services Management API. It lets game developers manage and reset Play Games Services testing and player/game metadata such as achievements, events, and hidden players.
summary: 1 HTTP API: Google Play Games Services Management API at `https://gamesmanagement.googleapis.com/`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens using the `games` scope.

surfaces.name: Google Play Games Services Management API
